command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
JOB_ID="job-20260625T123626Z-725c302a"

PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "import json,base64; print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps({'action':'get_job_status','job_id':'$JOB_ID','origin':'test','requested_by':'jose'}).encode()).decode())")
echo '=== FINAL JOB STATUS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1

echo '=== RUNNER LOG ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/$JOB_ID.runner.log 2>/dev/null" 2>&1

echo '=== JOB DIR ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/$JOB_ID/" 2>&1

echo DONE_1942
